name: X_element_architecture
description: X element subtelomeric repeat in S. cerevisiae. Found at all 32 telomeres immediately interior to the TG(1-3) terminal array. Comprises a 'core X' (~475 bp, ARS-like) plus a variable cassette of 'subterminal repeats' (STR-A through STR-D) of 30-150 bp. Boundaries of paralogous X regions span multiple telomeres at 70-90% pairwise identity.

architecture.internal_structure: core X (~475 bp) + 0-5 STR-A/B/C/D 30-150 bp modules; at every telomere
